title: Setup Docker
description: Scaffold src/docker/Dockerfile and add docker-build target to an NX project

project.description: Name of the NX project to configure
project.x-prompt: Which project do you want to configure?

appType.description: Application type — determines which Dockerfile template to use

x-prompt.message: What type of application is this?

port.x-prompt: Which port does the application listen on?

registry.description: Docker registry host (e.g. registry.elden-core.fr). Used as the default in the generated target.
